message:
perf(tests): optimize doctor test suite — 89s to 28s (bd-ktng)

- Reduce stale-closed-issues threshold from 10k to 100 in test (51s → 1.5s)
- Reduce duplicate-issues test counts with proportional thresholds (9s+3s → 0.6s+0.4s)
- Use raw SQL bulk insert instead of store.CreateIssue loops
- Make largeClosedIssuesThreshold a var for test overriding

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
